experiments.name: Era Blend Mode
experiments.hypothesis: Users who identify as 'Creator + Innovator' hybrids will have higher product click-through if we acknowledge the blend

experiments.name: Share Card Viral Loop
experiments.hypothesis: Adding an Instagram-optimized era share card will increase organic traffic by 15%+

experiments.name: Question Order Optimization
experiments.hypothesis: Leading with the aspirational question (Q5 style) as Q1 will increase answer length by 30%

experiments.name: Email Gate for Era Profile
experiments.hypothesis: Offering a saved era profile card (PDF/email) after reveal will convert 20%+ to email capture
